summary: Frontend E2E testing completed for Ketsia portfolio site after mobile responsiveness + Service Management Workflow + DetailedAutomations updates. All 27 tests passed across mobile (390px), tablet (768px) and desktop (1920px) viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is now 653 lines - still recommend splitting (Hero/About/Skills/Portfolio/Contact/Footer) into focused components for maintainability.
automations array is defined inline in Home.jsx (~125 lines) - extract to /data/automations.js.
Most interactive elements still lack data-testid attributes (portfolio cards, automation expanders, nav links, contact form fields). Add to harden automated testing.
DetailedAutomations.jsx: 'expanded' state is local per-card (good), but no exit animation works since AnimatePresence wrapper missing - the framer-motion exit prop will be ignored. Minor polish only.
Mobile nav menu is hidden behind md:flex with no hamburger - mobile users have no navigation. Consider adding mobile hamburger menu for accessibility.
seed_data_creation: Submitted 1 contact form: TEST_User / test_automation@example.com (success toast confirmed, form cleared).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 features in review request verified PASS. Mobile (390px) no horizontal scroll on Hero/About/Skills/Portfolio/Automations/Contact. N8N workflow stacks vertically on mobile (full-width nodes, single column) and single row on desktop (all 5 nodes y=138). Portfolio has 6 cards with Service Management Workflow as 2nd item, displays workflow/KPIs/outputs/tools correctly. #automations section renders 'Top 3 Automation Blueprints' with Lead Qualification expanded by default; Client Onboarding & Content Repurposing expand on click. Step indicators '01','02' visible, Start/End badges present, all 3 cards have distinct blue/cyan/indigo gradients. Contact form submission still works (success toast + form clear). Tablet 768px also overflow-free. Previously noted issues from iteration_2 (amber focus on Message textarea, placeholder footer social links, no data-testid attributes, unauthenticated /admin route) still apply but were not in scope.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
